title: Crypto News Jun 29 — Institutions dumped Bitcoin and Ethereum ETFs
description: Institutions are sending a clear message to the crypto market, and it's time to decode their strategy. According to recent data, institutions have been dumping Bitcoin and Ethereum ETFs at an alarming rate, with outflows dwarfing the inflows of other cryptocurrencies. However, amidst this mass exodus, they're still buying into XRP and HYPE, which suggests that they're not entirely bearish on the crypto market. This selective demand for specific altcoins indicates that institutions are drawing a ...

title: Crypto News Jun 29 — Institutions dumped Bitcoin and Ethereum ETFs
description: Institutional investors are sending a clear message to the crypto market: it's time to get selective. According to recent data, institutions have been dumping Bitcoin and Ethereum ETFs, but they're still buying up XRP and HYPE. This trend shows that institutions are separating their broad crypto risk from targeted altcoin exposure, essentially saying that not all cryptocurrencies are created equal. This matters because it indicates a growing maturity in the market, where investors are no longer ...
